title: Enterprise Sales
shortSummary: Selling to large organisations means longer cycles, more stakeholders, and higher stakes. Learn to navigate technical evaluations, procurement, and executive alignment to win big.
whyItMatters: Enterprise deals are the pinnacle of B2B sales. They involve 6-18 month cycles, 5-15 stakeholders, technical evaluators, procurement teams, legal reviews, and six-figure or seven-figure contract values. The skills that work in mid-market do not automatically scale to enterprise. You need political savvy, executive presence, technical collaboration, patience, and the ability to orchestrate a complex buying process.
coreConcepts: Enterprise buying process: from discovery to procurement
Navigating multiple stakeholders and buying committees
Executive sponsorship, champion development, and mutual action plans
Political navigation and paper process control
RFP/RFI response strategy and security review management
Proof of concept (POC) and pilot management
Contract negotiation at enterprise scale with finance and legal alignment
